raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I tried to place an order on XXXX XXXX website using my Citi Brandsource card. I had trouble trying to place the order, so I followed up with XXXX XXXX afterwards to see if they received the order. They confirmed they did not. A few days later the charge for the item showed on my Citi Brandsource card for {$3300.00}. I contacted Citi Retail services to dispute the charge based on the fact that I never received the charge as well as XXXX XXXX never receving payment for the order. I received notice from Citi Retail services after a few weeks that I was still responsible for the charge, even though they received documentation from XXXX that I had not received the order, nor had they been paid for the order. I contacted Citi Retail services to wage my complaint that I will not pay for an item I did not receive. This is not acceptable to make a consumer pay for something they did not receive. I have a letter from the VP of XXXX XXXX stating they never received payment for my order. I never received the Applicance.
